title: cyperus psilostachys
intro: Cyperus psilostachys, also known as Bulbous flatsedge, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cyperus psilostachys include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
